idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'energy bill shock' signals bearish XLE

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'energy bill shock'

behavior: A rise in searches for energy bill shock indicates consumer stress from rising energy costs, potentially reducing discretionary spending and pressuring energy sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer stress related to energy costs weighs on demand and sentiment in the energy sector.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short when Google Trends index for 'energy bill shock' increases by more than 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when the index falls below the 4-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy prices fluctuate frequently causing repeated consumer stress search spikes.

idea: Daily jump in freight railcar loadings signals bullish XLI
behavior: A sudden increase in railcar loadings implies rising industrial demand and shipment activity, signaling strength in industrials.

market_impact.rationale: Increased freight railcar usage precedes industrial production and capital goods demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily railcar loadings increase by more than 5% from prior day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if loadings decline 3 days in a row

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railcar loadings fluctuate frequently with industrial activity shifts.

idea: Weekly Google Trends spike for 'DIY car repair' signals bullish XLY

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'DIY car repair'

behavior: Rising interest in DIY car repair indicates consumers cutting costs, potentially signaling stress but increased spending in discretionary automotive retail.

market_impact.rationale: Higher DIY activity can lift discretionary retail and auto parts sales.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly Google Trends interest rises by 20% or more compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest declines 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY interest spikes seasonally and during cost pressures.

idea: Daily spike in political insider filings selling financial stocks signals bearish XLF
behavior: A surge in insider selling filings by politicians in financial stocks suggests negative sentiment or anticipated headwinds for the sector.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling by politically connected persons hints at deteriorating sector outlook.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily filings showing insider sales in XLF stocks exceed 2 standard deviations above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when filings normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider filings regularly fluctuate with market events.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' signals bearish XLI

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'truck driver shortage'

behavior: Rising searches for truck driver shortage signal labor constraints in logistics, pressuring industrial and transportation sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Labor shortages increase costs and disrupt freight logistics, pressuring industrial stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly Google Trends interest rises by 25% or more compared to prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest declines 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortage concerns fluctuate due to news and economic cycles.

idea: Daily surge in earthquake activity near major warehouses signals short-term bearish XLI

data.source: USGS daily earthquake data near key logistics hubs

behavior: Sudden increase in seismic activity near warehouse hubs may disrupt supply chains and logistics operations.

market_impact.rationale: Disruptions to freight logistics from natural events can pressure industrial stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count near hubs exceeds 3 times 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when earthquake activity subsides

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters occur intermittently near logistics hubs.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'home appliance repair delay' signals bearish XLP

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'home appliance repair delay'

behavior: Increasing consumer searches for appliance repair delays suggest supply chain issues and rising consumer frustration impacting staples demand.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain delays in staples reduce sales and increase consumer stress.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly Google Trends interest rises 20%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when trends revert below 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Supply chain and repair delays often spike seasonally or with shocks.

idea: Daily spike in EV charger installations signals bullish XLC
behavior: Rapid increases in EV charger installations indicate accelerating EV adoption and infrastructure build-out, benefiting communication and tech sectors.

market_impact.rationale: EV infrastructure growth supports tech and communication sectors through increased demand for related services.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily EV charger counts increase by more than 10% day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when daily increases fall below 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure expansions occur frequently as new projects come online.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'office reopening delay' signals bearish XLRE

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'office reopening delay'

behavior: Rising search interest in office reopening delays suggests commercial real estate usage is lagging, pressuring REITs.

market_impact.rationale: Delayed office reopening reduces commercial real estate demand and rental income.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly trend rises 30%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when trend falls below prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Office reopening news and delays frequently shift with corporate and pandemic updates.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'food delivery scam' signals bearish XLY

data.source: Google Trends daily data for 'food delivery scam'

behavior: Increasing searches for food delivery scams reflect consumer distrust and negative sentiment impacting discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer skepticism on food delivery can reduce usage and revenue for discretionary consumption.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily search interest rises 50%+ day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when interest falls below 3-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer trust issues and scams flare periodically causing search spikes.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'warehouse fire' signals bearish XLI

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'warehouse fire'

behavior: Rising interest in warehouse fires signals supply chain disruptions and inventory losses impacting industrial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Warehouse fires cause immediate logistics disruption and inventory write-offs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly trend rises 40%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when trend normalizes below 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse fire incidents and related media coverage occur several times yearly.

idea: Daily jump in Google Trends for 'childcare strike' signals bearish XLP

data.source: Google Trends daily data for 'childcare strike'

behavior: Spikes in childcare strike searches reflect labor unrest impacting consumer staples demand and workforce productivity.

market_impact.rationale: Labor strikes in childcare reduce working parent productivity and staples consumption.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily search interest spikes 60%+ day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when search interest reverts

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Childcare labor disputes arise periodically causing noticeable search spikes.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends for 'port worker overtime' signals bearish XLI

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'port worker overtime'

behavior: Increased searches for port worker overtime imply labor capacity strain that may delay shipments and pressure industrial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Labor strain in ports slows freight logistics and industrial supply chains.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if weekly search interest rises 30%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when interest falls below 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port labor issues surface repeatedly due to contract talks and seasonal demand.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'data breach class action' signals bearish XLK

data.source: Google Trends daily data for 'data breach class action'

behavior: Increasing interest in data breach lawsuits signals negative sentiment and potential regulatory risks for tech stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Legal and regulatory concerns weigh on technology sector valuations.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if daily search interest spikes 50%+ day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when search interest normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Data breach legal news and class actions flare unpredictably but frequently.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'inflation hedge gold' signals bullish XLB

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'inflation hedge gold'

behavior: Rising interest in gold as an inflation hedge signals macroeconomic concerns boosting demand for materials and mining stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Inflation worries drive rotation into materials sector as a hedge.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if weekly trend rises 30%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if trend falls below 4-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Inflation concerns and gold interest fluctuate frequently with macroeconomic data.
